title: Anthropic takes $5B from Amazon and pledges $100B in cloud spending in return
description: Amazon has made another circular AI deal: It's investing another $5 billion in Anthropic. Anthropic has agreed to spend $100 billion on AWS in return.

title: Fervo Energy unveils new power plant details in IPO filing
A Humanoid Robot Set a Half-Marathon Record in China
description: An autonomous robot from the company Honor ran a half marathon in 50:26, beating the human record by 7 minutes.

title: NASA Invites Media to SpaceX’s 34th Resupply Launch to Space Station
description: Media accreditation is open for the next U.S. launch to deliver NASA science investigations, supplies, and equipment to the International Space Station. title: Saildrone unveils new medium unmanned surface vessel for anti-sub warfare, ISR
description: The MUSV comes in two variants: the Spectre Silent Endurance, and the Spectre Stealth Strike.

title: FAA orders investigation into Blue Origin’s New Glenn mishap
description: The New Glenn rocket will have to stay grounded while the company investigates what caused the apparent failure of its upper stage.

title: NSA spies are reportedly using Anthropic’s Mythos, despite Pentagon feud
description: NSA is said to be using Anthropic's restricted Mythos AI model.

title: Rivian’s factory hit by tornado ahead of R2 launch
description: The tornado hit a newer part of the factory, primarily used for R2 logistics such as deliveries of parts. Rivian has paused operations in the building and expects to start back up sometime this week.

title: OpenAI’s existential questions
description: On the latest episode of Equity, we discuss OpenAI's latest acquisitions and whether they address "two big existential problems" for the company.

title: Blue Origin’s New Glenn put a customer satellite in the wrong orbit during its third launch
description: The first major failure of Blue Origin's new heavy-launch system could create delays to its ambition to help NASA and the Trump administration return to the moon.

title: AST Spacemobile BB7 Is Not Recoverable Per ASTS
description: ASTS admits the satellite is too low and cannot be saved. Based on what the orbit appears to be. 20kg of fuel they can only raise it part of the way. title: Siemens and Humanoid test HMND 01 Alpha for logistics tasks
description:
Siemens tested the Humanoid mobile manipulator using NVIDIA simulation and development tools at its electronics factory in Erlangen, Germany.

title: OpenAI Executive Kevin Weil Is Leaving the Company
description: The former Instagram VP is departing the ChatGPT-maker, which is folding the AI science application he led into Codex.

description:

description:

description:

title: Uber begins early test rides of Lucid Gravity robotaxis equipped with Nuro autonomy systems
description:
Level 4 autonomous technology expert Nuro shared the latest milestone of a partnership with Uber Technologies and Lucid Motors to develop a fleet of Gravity Robotaxi SUVs. Per the company, a select group of riders has begun test rides in California.

description: Following its recently announced partnership with Novo Nordisk, OpenAI is introducing a new reasoning model, GPT-Rosalind, to support research in biology, drug discovery and translational medicine.
